title: sesbania aculeata var. paludosa
intro: Sesbania aculeata var. paludosa, also known as the rice clammy clover, is a variety of the Sesbania aculeata plant, which is a type of legume native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and fever. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. In traditional medicine, Sesbania aculeata var. paludosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and also used as a topical application, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
